name: SLB (Schlumberger)

profile.description: SLB is the world's largest oilfield services company providing technology, digital solutions, and project management to the energy industry globally. SLB leads in digital oilfield solutions and AI-powered reservoir management.

innovation.label: STRONG
innovation.analysis: Scored 7/10 based on track record, AI deployment, market position, pipeline visibility, and R&D intensity. See yfinance data and web research for evidence [1].

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Scored 5/10 based on mission quality, community impact, employee retention, and insider buying signals [1].

infrastructure.label: STRONG
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored on available metrics. Liquidity passes ($931,919,538 daily) [1].

ai_resilience.label: LOW RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (7/9) + AI Opportunity (1/1) = 8/10. Scored based on business model's structural exposure or immunity to AI disruption [1].

infinite_game.summary: Scored 6/10 using 3-2-2-2-1 weighted framework (Just Cause, Courage, Trust, Flexibility, Rivals).

investment_thesis: SLB (Schlumberger) analysis based on current financial metrics and market positioning [1].
